name: ts-runtypes-pre-publish-e2e
description: Consumer end-to-end fixture. The release-gate.yml e2e job installs the PUBLISHED ts-runtypes + ts-runtypes-devtools at the release version from a local verdaccio registry, then this suite verifies the host-platform resolver binary resolves via the ts-runtypes-bin optional-dependency model, spawns, and rewrites both getRunTypeId call shapes. vite/vitest are pinned here as devDependencies so a workspace bump can't silently diverge the release-install test.
